69fe677ae2442def495d861c.leadin: This opera contains sections named for its title character “killing Marie” and “drowning”. For 10 points each:
69fe677ae2442def495d861c.leadin_sanitized: This opera contains sections named for its title character "killing Marie" and "drowning". For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this first opera composed by Alban Berg. This modernist opera follows the titular soldier succumbing to madness in the face of militaristic oppression.
Alban Berg was a member of the Second School of this city. Other members of that school named for this central European city include Arnold Schoenberg and Anton Webern.

Inspired by the Second Viennese School, this composer conducted the 3-act completed premiere of Berg’s second opera Lulu. This composer also created an abstract chamber cantata that sets poetry by René Char (“SHAR”) and used symbolist sonnets for his piece Pli selon pli.
parts_sanitized: Identify this first opera composed by Alban Berg. This modernist opera follows the titular soldier succumbing to madness in the face of militaristic oppression.
Alban Berg was a member of the Second School of this city. Other members of that school named for this central European city include Arnold Schoenberg and Anton Webern.

Inspired by the Second Viennese School, this composer conducted the 3-act completed premiere of Berg's second opera Lulu. This composer also created an abstract chamber cantata that sets poetry by Rene Char ("SHAR") and used symbolist sonnets for his piece Pli selon pli.
answers: Pierre Boulez(The cantata is Le Marteau sans maître or The Hammer Without A Master)
answers_sanitized: Vienna [or Wien, accept Second Viennese School]
Pierre Boulez(The cantata is Le Marteau sans maitre or The Hammer Without A Master)
